summary: Added a surgical opening bridge to carry the Chapter 8 aftermath directly into Chapter 9 while preserving the existing exit into the Chapter 10 machine-shop handoff.
edits: Linked the opening aftermath to the prior chapter by naming the pink mop water and cracked scanner Marisol left behind in the refusal car.
Kept the chapter ending unchanged because its first-maintenance-whistle machine-shop setup already aligns with the next chapter's delayed follow-through.
